files.description: Main entry point for the FastAPI application.

files.content:
import re

def validate_email(email: str) -> bool:
    # Simple regex for basic email validation
    email_regex = re.compile(
        r"^(?P<local>[a-zA-Z0-9._%+-]+)@(?P<domain>[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+\.[a-zA-Z]{2,})$",
        re.IGNORECASE
    )
    match = email_regex.match(email)
    if not match:
        return False
    domain = match.group('domain')
    if '..' in domain or domain.startswith('.') or domain.endswith('.'):  # Basic domain checks
        return False
    return True

test_files.description: Unit tests for the email validator.
test_files.content:
import unittest
from app.validators.email_validator import validate_email

class TestEmailValidator(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_valid_emails(self):
        self.assertTrue(validate_email("user@example.com"))
        self.assertTrue(validate_email("user.name+tag+sorting@example.com"))
        self.assertTrue(validate_email("user@sub.example.com"))
        self.assertTrue(validate_email("user@123.123.123.123"))
        self.assertTrue(validate_email("user@[IPv6:2001:db8::1]"))

    def test_invalid_emails(self):
        self.assertFalse(validate_email("plainaddress"))
        self.assertFalse(validate_email("@missingusername.com"))
        self.assertFalse(validate_email("username@.com"))
        self.assertFalse(validate_email("username@com"))
        self.assertFalse(validate_email("username@domain..com"))

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()

test_files.description: Unit tests for the phone validator.
test_files.content:
import unittest
from app.validators.phone_validator import validate_phone

class TestPhoneValidator(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_valid_phones(self):
        self.assertTrue(validate_phone("+1234567890"))
        self.assertTrue(validate_phone("1234567890"))
        self.assertTrue(validate_phone("+919876543210"))
        self.assertTrue(validate_phone("919876543210"))

    def test_invalid_phones(self):
        self.assertFalse(validate_phone("123456789"))
        self.assertFalse(validate_phone("+123456789"))
        self.assertFalse(validate_phone("12345678901234567890"))
        self.assertFalse(validate_phone("+12345678901234567890"))
        self.assertFalse(validate_phone("abc1234567890"))

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()

test_files.description: Integration tests for the API endpoints.
test_files.content:
import unittest
import json
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app

class TestAPI(unittest.TestCase):
    client = TestClient(app)

    def test_validate_email(self):
        response = self.client.post("/v1/validate/email", json={"email": "user@example.com"})
        self.assertEqual(response.status_code, 200)
        data = response.json()
        self.assertTrue(data["valid"])
        self.assertEqual(data["input"], "user@example.com")

    def test_validate_invalid_email(self):
        response = self.client.post("/v1/validate/email", json={"email": "invalid-email"})
        self.assertEqual(response.status_code, 400)

    def test_validate_phone(self):
        response = self.client.post("/v1/validate/phone", json={"phone": "+1234567890"})
        self.assertEqual(response.status_code, 200)
        data = response.json()
        self.assertTrue(data["valid"])
        self.assertEqual(data["input"], "+1234567890")

    def test_validate_invalid_phone(self):
        response = self.client.post("/v1/validate/phone", json={"phone": "123456789"})
        self.assertEqual(response.status_code, 400)

    def test_validate_batch(self):
        response = self.client.post("/v1/validate/batch", json={"items": [{"type": "email", "value": "user@example.com"}, {"type": "phone", "value": "+1234567890"}]})
        self.assertEqual(response.status_code, 200)
        data = response.json()
        self.assertEqual(len(data["results"]), 2)
        self.assertTrue(data["results"][0]["valid"])
        self.assertTrue(data["results"][1]["valid"])

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()
